articles.title: Tether Pursues Big Four Audit Amid Growing Industry Scrutiny
articles.description:
Tether is reportedly in talks with a Big Four auditor to verify its USDT reserves amid mounting scrutiny. CEO Paolo Ardoino says Trump’s pro-crypto stance could accelerate the audit process.

The post Tether Pursues Big Four Audit Amid Growing Industry Scrutiny first appeared on Ecoinimist.

articles.title: BlackRock, NYSE push for staked ETH ETFs – Why it matters
articles.description: BlackRock and NYSE Arca are advocating for staking-enabled ETH ETFs to enhance investor returns. Regulatory approval remains key.
